questions.explanation: The Ghost is the starship home base for the crew of rebels led by Hera Syndulla.

questions.question: Who is the skilled pilot that captains the Ghost crew in Star Wars Rebels?
questions.explanation: Hera Syndulla is the skilled pilot and captain who leads the Ghost crew in Star Wars Rebels.

questions.question: Which street-smart orphan from Lothal is trained to become a Jedi in Star Wars Rebels?
questions.explanation: Ezra Bridger, a young orphan on Lothal, is trained as a Jedi by Kanan Jarrus.

questions.question: What is the nickname of the genetically unique clone commando squad in The Bad Batch?
questions.explanation: Clone Force 99, nicknamed the Bad Batch, is a squad of genetically unique clone troopers.

questions.question: Which fierce Mandalorian warrior fights to reclaim Mandalore's throne in The Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Bo-Katan Kryze is a Mandalorian warrior who fights to reclaim Mandalore's throne in The Clone Wars.

questions.question: What robotic army does the Separatist Alliance rely on during the Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: The Separatist Alliance relies on vast armies of battle droids to fight the Republic's clone troopers.

questions.question: What lone bounty hunter becomes the protector of a Force-sensitive child in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: Din Djarin, a lone Mandalorian bounty hunter, becomes the protector of Grogu in The Mandalorian.

questions.question: What is the real name of the green Force-sensitive child nicknamed 'Baby Yoda'?
questions.explanation: The character popularly nicknamed 'Baby Yoda' is officially named Grogu.

questions.question: Which former Jedi Padawan leads the search for Grand Admiral Thrawn in her own series?
questions.explanation: In the Ahsoka series, Ahsoka Tano leads the search for the missing Grand Admiral Thrawn.

questions.question: What strict Mandalorian sect raises Din Djarin and never removes its helmet?
questions.explanation: The Children of the Watch is a strict Mandalorian sect that never removes its helmet, raising Din Djarin.

questions.question: Which show follows Cassian Andor before he joins the Rebellion in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: Andor chronicles Cassian Andor's transformation into a Rebel spy years before Rogue One.

questions.question: Which bounty hunter reclaims his armor and becomes a crime lord in The Book of Boba Fett?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett becomes the new crime lord of Jabba's former territory in The Book of Boba Fett.

questions.question: Which small, green Jedi Master trains generations of Jedi for over 800 years?
questions.explanation: Yoda is the diminutive, wise Jedi Master who trains generations of Jedi for over 800 years.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Who is the Jedi Master that trains both Anakin and later Luke Skywalker?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan Kenobi trains Anakin Skywalker as his Padawan and later mentors Luke Skywalker.

questions.question: Which Jedi Council member is famous for wielding a distinctive purple lightsaber?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu is a senior Jedi Council member famous for his distinctive purple lightsaber.

questions.question: What title is given to a Jedi student training under a Jedi Knight or Master?
questions.explanation: A Padawan is a Jedi apprentice who trains directly under a Jedi Knight or Master.

questions.question: Who was Qui-Gon Jinn's Jedi Master before Qui-Gon trained Obi-Wan?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku trained Qui-Gon Jinn before Dooku later left the Jedi Order and turned to the dark side.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: What signature weapon do Jedi Knights traditionally build and carry?
questions.explanation: Jedi construct their own lightsabers, energy-bladed weapons that become an extension of themselves.

questions.question: What color is Yoda's lightsaber blade?
questions.explanation: Yoda wields a green-bladed lightsaber, as seen in his duels throughout the prequel films.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: What ancient rule limits the Sith to only two members at any given time?
questions.explanation: The Rule of Two states there can only ever be a Sith Master and a Sith apprentice at one time.

questions.question: What injures Anakin so badly on Mustafar that he requires his iconic black armor?
answers: Severe burns from lava and lightsaber wounds
questions.explanation: Anakin suffers devastating burns and injuries on Mustafar, requiring the life-sustaining armor of Darth Vader.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What is the Sith name of Emperor Palpatine, revealing his true identity as a Dark Lord?
questions.explanation: Emperor Palpatine's secret Sith identity is Darth Sidious, mastermind behind the fall of the Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What is Count Dooku's Sith name after he leaves the Jedi Order?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku takes the Sith name Darth Tyranus after becoming Darth Sidious's apprentice.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which horned Sith apprentice wields a red double-bladed lightsaber in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul, Darth Sidious's fearsome apprentice, fights with a distinctive double-bladed lightsaber.

questions.question: What color do Sith lightsabers traditionally glow?
questions.explanation: Sith lightsabers glow red because Sith users bleed their kyber crystals through the dark side.

questions.question: Which protocol droid is fluent in over six million forms of communication?
questions.explanation: C-3PO is a protocol droid famously fluent in over six million forms of communication.

questions.question: Which astromech droid is Luke Skywalker's loyal companion throughout the Skywalker Saga?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 is the resourceful astromech droid who accompanies Luke Skywalker on many adventures.

questions.question: What reprogrammed Imperial security droid aids Cassian Andor in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: K-2SO is a reprogrammed Imperial security droid who aids Cassian Andor in Rogue One.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Which reprogrammed assassin droid protects and cares for Grogu in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: IG-11 is a reprogrammed assassin droid that protects and cares for Grogu in The Mandalorian.

questions.question: What type of droid is BB-8, distinguished by its ball-shaped body?
questions.explanation: BB-8 is a spherical astromech droid that debuted in Star Wars: The Force Awakens.

questions.question: Who builds the protocol droid C-3PO out of spare parts as a young boy on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: A young Anakin Skywalker builds the protocol droid C-3PO on Tatooine in The Phantom Menace.

questions.question: What is the name of the desert planet where Luke Skywalker grows up?
questions.explanation: Tatooine is the harsh desert planet where Luke Skywalker is raised by his aunt and uncle.

questions.question: Which ice planet hosts the Rebel Echo Base at the start of The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: The Rebel Alliance hides its Echo Base on the frozen planet Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What forest moon is home to the small, furry Ewoks?
questions.explanation: The forest moon of Endor is inhabited by the Ewoks who help the Rebels defeat the Empire.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which lush, watery planet is the peaceful homeworld of Padme Amidala?
questions.explanation: Naboo is the green, watery homeworld of Padme Amidala, seen in The Phantom Menace.

questions.question: What is the name of Princess Leia's peaceful home planet, destroyed by the Death Star?
questions.explanation: The Death Star destroys Leia's home planet, Alderaan, to demonstrate its power in A New Hope.

questions.question: Which city-covered planet serves as the capital of the Galactic Republic and later the Empire?
questions.explanation: Coruscant is the ecumenopolis, or city-covered planet, that serves as the galaxy's capital.

questions.question: What desert planet does scavenger Rey call home before joining the Resistance?
questions.explanation: Rey lives as a scavenger on the desert planet Jakku before the events of The Force Awakens.

questions.question: What is the name of Han Solo's famous ship, said to make the Kessel Run in under twelve parsecs?
questions.explanation: The Millennium Falcon is Han Solo's beloved and speedy ship, famed for its Kessel Run boast.

questions.question: What starfighter does Luke Skywalker fly during the attack on the first Death Star?
questions.explanation: Luke Skywalker pilots an X-wing starfighter in the Rebel attack on the Death Star.

questions.question: What is the standard starfighter flown by Imperial pilots, known for its twin wings?
questions.explanation: The TIE fighter, short for Twin Ion Engine fighter, is the Empire's standard starfighter.

questions.question: What starship is used by both bounty hunter Jango Fett and his son Boba Fett?
questions.explanation: Slave I is the distinctive starship used by both Jango Fett and his son, Boba Fett.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What massive Imperial superweapon can destroy entire planets in A New Hope?
questions.explanation: The Death Star is a moon-sized battle station capable of obliterating entire planets.

questions.question: What is Darth Vader's personal Super Star Destroyer flagship called?
questions.explanation: The Executor is Darth Vader's massive Super Star Destroyer flagship in The Empire Strikes Back.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What First Order superweapon, built into an entire planet, destroys the Hosnian system?
questions.explanation: Starkiller Base is a planet converted into a superweapon that fires on the Hosnian system.

questions.question: What towering, hairy creature serves as Han Solo's co-pilot and best friend?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca is a Wookiee warrior who serves as Han Solo's loyal co-pilot on the Millennium Falcon.

questions.question: What species is Chewbacca, known for great height, strength, and loyalty?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca belongs to the Wookiee species, native to the forest planet Kashyyyk.

questions.question: What giant, slug-like crime lord rules Tatooine's underworld and imprisons Han Solo?
questions.explanation: Jabba the Hutt is a massive gangster who holds Han Solo captive in Return of the Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: What large, furry creatures do Tusken Raiders ride across the deserts of Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Banthas are massive, shaggy creatures traditionally ridden by the Tusken Raiders of Tatooine.

questions.question: What snow creatures do Rebel troops ride for patrols on the ice planet Hoth?
questions.explanation: Tauntauns are cold-adapted creatures ridden by Rebel scouts on Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What giant creature living inside an asteroid nearly swallows the Millennium Falcon?
questions.explanation: The Millennium Falcon narrowly escapes a giant space slug living inside an asteroid field.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Which smuggler administers Cloud City before joining the Rebels as a general?
questions.explanation: Lando Calrissian administers Cloud City and later becomes a Rebel general who helps destroy the Death Star II.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which centuries-old pirate runs a castle sanctuary on the planet Takodana?
questions.explanation: Maz Kanata is a centuries-old pirate who runs a castle sanctuary on the planet Takodana.

questions.question: Who is Luke and Leia's mother, seen in the prequel trilogy as a senator of Naboo?
questions.explanation: Padme Amidala, senator of Naboo, is the mother of both Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which moisture farmers raise young Luke Skywalker as their own on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Owen and Beru Lars are the moisture farmers who raise Luke as their own on Tatooine.

questions.question: Which Mon Calamari admiral is famous for shouting 'It's a trap!'?
questions.explanation: Admiral Ackbar is the Mon Calamari commander famous for his warning cry, 'It's a trap!'
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which princess-turned-general later founds the Resistance against the First Order?
questions.explanation: Leia Organa serves as a princess, Rebel leader, and general, later founding the Resistance.

questions.question: Which Sullustan pilot co-pilots the Millennium Falcon during the Battle of Endor?
questions.explanation: The Sullustan pilot Nien Nunb co-pilots the Millennium Falcon with Lando during the Battle of Endor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: During the Battle of Endor, what does Han Solo's strike team destroy on the forest moon?
questions.explanation: Han Solo leads a strike team to destroy the shield generator protecting the second Death Star at Endor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: What event forces the Rebel Alliance to evacuate their base on Hoth?
questions.explanation: The Empire's AT-AT walkers launch a ground assault on Echo Base, forcing the Rebels to evacuate Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What galaxy-changing declaration does Palpatine make at the end of Revenge of the Sith?
questions.explanation: Palpatine declares the Republic reorganized into the first Galactic Empire, with himself as Emperor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What daring mission do Rebel spies undertake in the events of Rogue One?
questions.explanation: Rogue One follows a group of Rebels who steal the technical plans for the first Death Star.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: What ceremony closes out Star Wars: A New Hope on the Rebel base at Yavin 4?
answers: A medal ceremony honoring Luke and Han
questions.explanation: A New Hope ends with a ceremony where Princess Leia awards medals to Luke and Han for their heroism.

questions.question: What causes Anakin Skywalker to turn to the dark side and become Darth Vader?
questions.explanation: Anakin turns to the dark side, driven by fear of loss and manipulated by Palpatine's lies.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What title does Lando Calrissian hold on Cloud City in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: Lando Calrissian governs the Tibanna gas mining colony of Cloud City as its Baron Administrator before the Empire arrives.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Which unique lightsaber blade color belongs to Jedi Master Mace Windu?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu wields a distinctive purple-bladed lightsaber, a color unique to him among the Jedi Order.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Bo-Katan Kryze is a warrior and eventual ruler from which planet?
questions.explanation: Bo-Katan Kryze hails from Mandalore and later becomes its ruler after the fall of Darth Maul's rule.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, Grogu belongs to the same mysterious species as which legendary Jedi Master?
questions.explanation: Grogu is a member of Yoda's unnamed species, though his exact relation to Yoda remains unrevealed.

questions.question: Which frozen planet hosts the secret Rebel base seen in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: The Rebel Alliance establishes Echo Base on the ice planet Hoth before the Empire discovers and attacks it.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: The Millennium Falcon began as which type of Corellian freighter?
questions.explanation: The Millennium Falcon is a heavily modified YT-1300 light freighter originally built by Corellian Engineering Corporation.

questions.question: What signature weapon does Darth Maul wield in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul fights with a double-bladed lightsaber, spinning it to battle two Jedi at once on Naboo.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Padmé Amidala serves as the elected queen of which planet?
questions.explanation: Padmé Amidala is elected Queen of Naboo and later becomes one of its senators in the Galactic Senate.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: On which desert planet does Rey work as a scavenger before joining the Resistance?
questions.explanation: Rey scavenges fallen Star Destroyer wreckage on the desert planet Jakku before meeting BB-8 and Finn.

questions.question: Chewbacca belongs to which tall, hairy species native to Kashyyyk?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca is a Wookiee, a species of tall, hair-covered warriors native to the forest planet Kashyyyk.

questions.question: On which planet does Obi-Wan Kenobi defeat Darth Maul in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan Kenobi cuts Darth Maul in half and he falls down a reactor shaft during their duel on Naboo.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: What Sith name does Count Dooku take as Darth Sidious's apprentice?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku becomes Darth Sidious's second apprentice under the Sith name Darth Tyranus.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Boba Fett is raised as an unaltered clone of which bounty hunter?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett is raised by Jango Fett as his unaltered son, cloned to be genetically identical to him.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, which bounty hunter captures Han Solo?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett delivers a carbonite-frozen Han Solo to Jabba the Hutt.

questions.question: Which astromech droid carries the stolen Death Star plans aboard the Tantive IV?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 secretly carries the stolen Death Star plans aboard the Tantive IV at the start of A New Hope.

questions.question: The first Death Star is destroyed during which climactic battle?
questions.explanation: Luke Skywalker destroys the first Death Star during the Battle of Yavin by firing a torpedo into its exhaust port.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what protects the second Death Star's shield?
questions.explanation: A shield generator on the forest moon of Endor protects the second Death Star.

questions.question: Ahsoka Tano serves as the Padawan learner of which Jedi Knight?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano is assigned as Anakin Skywalker's Padawan during the Clone Wars.

questions.question: Darth Sidious is the secret Sith identity of which Galactic Senate figure?
questions.explanation: Chancellor Palpatine secretly rules the galaxy as the Sith Lord Darth Sidious.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which blue-skinned bounty hunter frequently works alongside Count Dooku in The Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Cad Bane, a Duros bounty hunter, is hired by Count Dooku for several missions during the Clone Wars.

questions.question: What phrase do followers of the Mandalorian Creed often say to affirm their code?
answers: May the Force be with you
questions.explanation: Mandalorians who follow the Creed, including Din Djarin, affirm their code by saying "This is the Way."

questions.question: Cassian Andor works as an intelligence officer for which organization?
questions.explanation: Cassian Andor serves as an intelligence officer for the Rebel Alliance in Rogue One and Andor.

questions.question: Jyn Erso leads the mission to steal the plans for which Imperial weapon?
questions.explanation: Jyn Erso leads a team of Rebels to steal the Death Star's technical plans on Scarif.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Qui-Gon Jinn discovers young Anakin Skywalker enslaved on which planet?
questions.explanation: Qui-Gon Jinn meets the enslaved boy Anakin Skywalker while stranded on Tatooine.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: The Gungans build their underwater city of Otoh Gunga on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Gungan city of Otoh Gunga lies beneath the swamps and lakes of Naboo.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Which planet houses the cloning facilities that produce the Republic's clone army?
questions.explanation: The oceanic planet Kamino hosts the facilities where clone troopers are grown from Jango Fett's genetic template.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: What is the name of the secret command that turns clone troopers against the Jedi?
questions.explanation: Order 66 is the secret directive that causes clone troopers across the galaxy to execute their Jedi commanders.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which cyborg Separatist commander collects the lightsabers of Jedi he defeats?
questions.explanation: General Grievous, the Separatist supreme commander, keeps a trophy collection of lightsabers taken from fallen Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: After the fall of the Jedi Order, Yoda goes into exile on which swamp planet?
questions.explanation: Master Yoda hides in exile on the remote swamp planet Dagobah after Order 66.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Han Solo makes his living as a smuggler and captain of which starship?
questions.explanation: Han Solo captains the Millennium Falcon, using it for smuggling runs before joining the Rebel Alliance.

questions.question: Princess Leia Organa is the adoptive royal daughter of which planet?
questions.explanation: Leia Organa is raised as the princess of Alderaan by Bail and Breha Organa.

questions.question: Which four-legged Imperial walker attacks the Rebel base during the Battle of Hoth?
questions.explanation: Imperial AT-AT walkers march on Echo Base during the Battle of Hoth in The Empire Strikes Back.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Boba Fett is nearly killed by which creature living in a pit on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett falls into the Sarlacc's pit at the Great Pit of Carkoon during the battle over Jabba's skiff.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Jabba the Hutt keeps which large creature in a pit beneath his throne room?
questions.explanation: Jabba the Hutt keeps a Rancor in a pit beneath his palace and feeds prisoners to it for entertainment.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which ice creature drags Luke Skywalker into its lair on Hoth?
questions.explanation: A Wampa captures Luke Skywalker and drags him to its cave on the ice planet Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Who serves as Jabba the Hutt's Twi'lek majordomo at his palace?
questions.explanation: Bib Fortuna acts as Jabba the Hutt's majordomo, managing visitors at his Tatooine palace.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Who serves as the chief political leader of the Rebel Alliance in the Original Trilogy?
questions.explanation: Mon Mothma leads the Rebel Alliance as its chief spokesperson and strategist during the war against the Empire.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which Rebel pilot survives the trench runs at both the first and second Death Stars?
questions.explanation: Wedge Antilles is the only Rebel pilot to survive the attack runs on both the first and second Death Stars.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which Mon Calamari admiral leads the Rebel fleet at the Battle of Endor?
questions.explanation: Admiral Ackbar commands the Rebel fleet at the Battle of Endor, famously warning "It's a trap!"
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Kylo Ren was born with which name before turning to the dark side?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren is born Ben Solo, the son of Han Solo and Leia Organa, before falling to the dark side.

questions.question: Who leads the First Order as its Supreme Leader before Kylo Ren?
questions.explanation: Snoke rules the First Order as Supreme Leader until Kylo Ren kills him in The Last Jedi.

questions.question: Finn is introduced as a First Order stormtrooper with which designation?
questions.explanation: Finn begins the story as First Order stormtrooper FN-2187 before deserting during a raid on Jakku.

questions.question: Poe Dameron serves the Resistance primarily as which type of specialist?
questions.explanation: Poe Dameron is the Resistance's best X-wing pilot, leading squadrons against the First Order.

questions.question: Which round astromech droid belongs to Resistance pilot Poe Dameron?
questions.explanation: BB-8 is Poe Dameron's loyal astromech droid, known for its spherical, rolling design.

questions.question: Which pirate leader operates a castle stronghold on the planet Takodana?
questions.explanation: Maz Kanata runs a castle on Takodana that serves as a watering hole for smugglers and travelers.

questions.question: What is the name of the First Order superweapon that drains a star for power?
questions.explanation: Starkiller Base is a First Order weapon built into an ice planet that drains a sun's energy to fire.

questions.question: The Resistance makes its last stand against the First Order on which crystalline planet?
questions.explanation: The Resistance's remaining fighters make a desperate final stand on the salt-crusted planet Crait.

questions.question: Ahsoka Tano leaves the Jedi Order after being falsely accused of which crime?
answers: Betraying the Republic to the Separatists
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano is falsely accused of bombing the Jedi Temple and leaves the Order even after being exonerated.

questions.question: During which event does Darth Vader reveal to Luke that he is his father?
answers: Their duel on the second Death Star
Their duel on the first Death Star
questions.explanation: Darth Vader reveals he is Luke's father during their lightsaber duel above Cloud City on Bespin.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Emperor Palpatine meets his death by being thrown down a reactor shaft during which battle?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader hurls Emperor Palpatine down a reactor shaft aboard the second Death Star during the Battle of Endor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which Hutt crime lord controls much of the criminal underworld on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Jabba the Hutt rules the criminal underworld of Tatooine from his palace outside Mos Eisley.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: What type of crystal focuses the energy inside every lightsaber blade?
questions.explanation: Every lightsaber is powered by a kyber crystal, which focuses energy into the weapon's signature blade.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which ancient Sith Lord established the Rule of Two, limiting the Sith to a master and apprentice?
questions.explanation: Darth Bane created the Rule of Two, ensuring only one Sith master and one apprentice exist at a time.

questions.question: Palpatine tells Anakin the tragedy of which Sith Lord who could manipulate midichlorians?
questions.explanation: Palpatine recounts the tragedy of Darth Plagueis, a Sith Lord rumored to influence midichlorians to prevent death.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: The Clone Wars are fought primarily between the Galactic Republic and which faction?
questions.explanation: The Clone Wars pit the Galactic Republic's clone army against the droid forces of the Separatist Alliance.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: The first battle of the Clone Wars takes place on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Clone Wars officially begin with the Battle of Geonosis, where clone troopers first fight for the Republic.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Anakin and Obi-Wan fight their climactic duel on which volcanic planet?
questions.explanation: Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi battle to near-death on the lava-covered planet Mustafar.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which planet serves as the capital of the Galactic Republic and later the Empire?
questions.explanation: Coruscant, a city-covered planet, serves as the seat of the Galactic Senate and Republic capital.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: The Jedi Order maintains its central temple on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Jedi Temple, home of the Jedi Order and its Council, stands on the capital planet Coruscant.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: As a boy on Tatooine, Anakin Skywalker builds which protocol droid?
questions.explanation: Young Anakin Skywalker builds C-3PO from spare parts while enslaved on Tatooine.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Which Toydarian junk dealer owns Anakin and Shmi Skywalker as slaves?
questions.explanation: Watto, a Toydarian shop owner, holds Anakin and his mother Shmi as slaves on Tatooine.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: The Republic's entire clone army is genetically templated from which bounty hunter?
questions.explanation: Every clone trooper in the Republic's army is grown using the genetic template of bounty hunter Jango Fett.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which clone trooper captain becomes a trusted friend of Ahsoka Tano during the Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Captain Rex, a clone trooper of the 501st Legion, fights alongside Ahsoka Tano throughout the Clone Wars.

questions.question: Which jovial pirate captain frequently clashes and allies with the Republic's heroes?
questions.explanation: Hondo Ohnaka, a Weequay pirate captain, alternates between rivalry and uneasy alliance with the Republic's heroes.

questions.question: In Star Wars: Rebels, Darth Maul survives and seeks revenge against which former Jedi?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul survives his defeat on Naboo and pursues a long grudge against Obi-Wan Kenobi in Star Wars: Rebels.

questions.question: Which Jedi survivor of Order 66 mentors Ezra Bridger aboard the starship Ghost?
questions.explanation: Kanan Jarrus, a Jedi who survived Order 66 in hiding, trains young Ezra Bridger in Star Wars: Rebels.

questions.question: Which young Force-sensitive street orphan becomes the central hero of Star Wars: Rebels?
questions.explanation: Ezra Bridger, a Force-sensitive orphan from Lothal, is recruited by the crew of the Ghost in Star Wars: Rebels.

questions.question: Which Mandalorian artist and explosives expert serves aboard the Ghost in Star Wars: Rebels?
questions.explanation: Sabine Wren, a Mandalorian artist skilled with explosives, is a founding member of the Ghost crew.

questions.question: Which Twi'lek pilot captains the starship Ghost in Star Wars: Rebels?
questions.explanation: Hera Syndulla, a skilled Twi'lek pilot, captains the Ghost and leads its crew of rebels.

questions.question: Which calculating Chiss officer serves as a Grand Admiral in the Imperial Navy?
questions.explanation: Grand Admiral Thrawn, a Chiss tactical genius, rises through the Imperial Navy and battles the Ghost crew in Rebels.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, which Imperial remnant leader wields the ancient Darksaber?
questions.explanation: Moff Gideon commands Imperial remnants in The Mandalorian while wielding the legendary Darksaber.

questions.question: The Darksaber is a unique lightsaber distinguished by which feature?
questions.explanation: The Darksaber is famous for its unusual black blade, unlike the colored blades of typical lightsabers.

questions.question: Which black-clad dark side agent hunts surviving Jedi after Order 66?
questions.explanation: The Grand Inquisitor leads a group of dark side agents tasked with hunting down Jedi who survived Order 66.

questions.question: In Obi-Wan Kenobi, the Inquisitor known as the Third Sister goes by what name?
questions.explanation: Reva, also called the Third Sister, is an Inquisitor who relentlessly pursues Obi-Wan Kenobi.

questions.question: Which former Rebel shock trooper serves as marshal of Nevarro in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: Cara Dune, a former Rebel shock trooper, becomes the marshal of the town of Nevarro.

questions.question: Who leads the Bounty Hunters' Guild on Nevarro in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: Greef Karga runs the local Bounty Hunters' Guild chapter on the planet Nevarro.

questions.question: In Ahsoka, Sabine Wren searches the galaxy for Ezra Bridger and which exiled Imperial officer?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren search for Ezra Bridger, who vanished into hyperspace along with Grand Admiral Thrawn.

questions.question: Andor's early episodes center on Cassian's search for parts on which industrial planet?
questions.explanation: Cassian Andor's story begins on the industrial planet Ferrix, where he searches for a missing part.

questions.question: In The Book of Boba Fett, Boba Fett claims the former throne of which crime lord?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett takes over Jabba the Hutt's former criminal territory on Tatooine in The Book of Boba Fett.

questions.question: Which secretive rebel operative funds and coordinates spies against the Empire in Andor?
questions.explanation: Luthen Rael quietly builds and funds a network of rebel spies years before the Rebel Alliance forms in Andor.

questions.question: Darth Vader personally pilots which advanced Imperial starfighter?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader flies a specialized TIE Advanced x1 starfighter, more heavily armed than standard TIE fighters.

questions.question: Boba Fett's personal starship is which Firespray-class patrol craft?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett flies Slave I, a Kuat Systems Firespray-class patrol and interrogation vessel.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Rebel pilots at the Battle of Yavin fly which starfighter into the Death Star trench?
questions.explanation: Luke Skywalker and fellow Rebel pilots fly T-65 X-wing starfighters during the trench run at the Battle of Yavin.

questions.question: What is the standard single-pilot starfighter of the Imperial Navy called?
questions.explanation: The TIE fighter, short for Twin Ion Engine fighter, is the Empire's mass-produced standard starfighter.

questions.question: Anakin Skywalker flies which starfighter when he destroys the droid control ship?
questions.explanation: Anakin Skywalker accidentally destroys the Trade Federation's droid control ship while piloting a Naboo N-1 starfighter.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Mandalorian armor is traditionally forged from which rare, nearly indestructible metal?
questions.explanation: Beskar, a rare and nearly indestructible metal, is the traditional material used to forge Mandalorian armor.

questions.question: Which small, round-eyed creatures live on the island planet Ahch-To?
questions.explanation: Porgs are small seabird-like creatures native to the remote island planet Ahch-To.

questions.question: Which mystical creatures are closely tied to the planet Lothal and the Force?
questions.explanation: Loth-wolves are mystical, Force-connected creatures native to the planet Lothal, appearing in Rebels and Ahsoka.

questions.question: Which shaggy pack animals do Rebel troops ride for patrols on Hoth?
questions.explanation: Rebel soldiers ride tauntauns, cold-adapted reptomammals, to patrol the icy surface of Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What creature lurks in the Death Star's trash compactor and grabs Luke Skywalker?
questions.explanation: A tentacled Dianoga hides in the Death Star's garbage masher and drags Luke Skywalker underwater.

questions.question: What do the Rebels call their hidden headquarters built into the ancient ruins on Yavin 4?
questions.explanation: The Rebel Alliance's Yavin 4 base is built inside the Great Temple, an ancient structure left by the Massassi people.

questions.question: What is the name of Boba Fett's Firespray-class starship?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett pilots the modified Firespray-31 patrol craft known as Slave I throughout the original trilogy.

questions.question: Which Trandoshan bounty hunter joins the hunt for the Millennium Falcon in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: Bossk is the reptilian Trandoshan hunter seen among the bounty hunters Darth Vader assembles aboard the Executor.

questions.question: What creature living inside an asteroid swallows the Millennium Falcon in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: The Falcon crew unknowingly lands inside the mouth of an exogorth, a massive space slug dwelling in the asteroid field.

questions.question: On which forest moon do the Ewoks help Rebel commandos destroy the second Death Star's shield generator?
questions.explanation: The strike team led by Han Solo teams up with the native Ewoks on the forest moon of Endor to disable the shield generator.

questions.question: What is the name of the droid supervisor who oversees the droid pool inside Jabba the Hutt's palace?
questions.explanation: EV-9D9 is the eager droid overseer shown assigning newly arrived droids to their duties in Jabba's palace.

questions.question: What is the name of Darth Vader's massive Star Dreadnought flagship?
questions.explanation: The Executor is Darth Vader's personal Super Star Destroyer, seen commanding Imperial fleets in the original trilogy.

questions.question: What is the name of the settlement nearest the Lars homestead where Luke buys power converters?
questions.explanation: Luke mentions going into Anchorhead, the moisture-farming settlement nearest his aunt and uncle's homestead.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, what type of Trade Federation vessel does Anakin accidentally destroy above Naboo?
questions.explanation: Anakin's stray shot ignites a chain reaction inside the Droid Control Ship, shutting down the battle droid army on Naboo.

questions.question: What is the name of Padmé Amidala's decoy handmaiden who impersonates the queen in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Sabé poses as Queen Amidala for public appearances while the real Padmé travels disguised as a handmaiden.

questions.question: What is the name of Anakin Skywalker's mother, a slave on Tatooine freed by Qui-Gon's wager?
questions.explanation: Shmi Skywalker is Anakin's mother, whose death at the hands of Tusken Raiders pushes him toward the dark side.

questions.question: On which planet does Obi-Wan Kenobi discover the secret clone army being grown for the Republic?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan tracks a bounty hunter's trail to the stormy ocean world of Kamino, home to the cloning facilities.

questions.question: Who is the Kaminoan prime minister who proudly shows Obi-Wan the clone army's progress?
questions.explanation: Lama Su, the Kaminoan prime minister, welcomes Obi-Wan and explains the clone army was commissioned years earlier.

questions.question: Which bounty hunter serves as the unaltered genetic template for the Republic's clone army?
questions.explanation: Jango Fett is the bounty hunter whose genetic material was used to create every clone trooper in the Republic army.

questions.question: Who is the Utapaun Port Administrator who secretly helps Obi-Wan Kenobi locate General Grievous?
questions.explanation: Tion Medon quietly warns Obi-Wan of Grievous's presence and helps him get inside the sinkhole city on Utapau.

questions.question: What is the name of the desert scavenger planet where Rey lives at the start of The Force Awakens?
questions.explanation: Rey survives by scavenging starship wreckage on Jakku before being drawn into the galaxy-wide conflict.

questions.question: What is the name of the sleek starfighter Kylo Ren pilots in The Last Jedi?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren's personal starfighter, the TIE Silencer, is distinguished by its sweeping wing design and heavy weaponry.

questions.question: Which purple-haired Resistance officer sacrifices herself by ramming her ship into Snoke's flagship?
questions.explanation: Vice Admiral Amilyn Holdo executes a lightspeed ramming maneuver to save the fleeing Resistance transports.

questions.question: What ancient Sith device does Kylo Ren use to locate the hidden planet Exegol?
questions.explanation: A Sith wayfinder is a navigational relic used to guide ships through the hidden path to Exegol.

questions.question: What is the name of Endor's ocean moon where Rey confronts Kylo Ren atop the wrecked Death Star II?
questions.explanation: Kef Bir is the water-covered moon of Endor where the remains of the second Death Star lie half-submerged.

questions.question: What is the designation of the small, cone-headed droid Rey rescues on Pasaana?
questions.explanation: D-O is the nervous, conical-headed droid Rey finds and befriends during her journey in The Rise of Skywalker.

questions.question: What is Ahsoka Tano's Togruta homeworld, first named in The Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano hails from Shili, the homeworld of the Togruta species, though she was raised within the Jedi Order.

questions.question: Which pacifist Duchess governs Mandalore during much of the Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Duchess Satine Kryze leads Mandalore's New Mandalorian government and champions neutrality during the war.

questions.question: Which Imperial Inquisitor in Star Wars Rebels wields a lightsaber that spins like a wheel with blades on both ends?
questions.explanation: The Grand Inquisitor carries a distinctive circular-bladed lightsaber that rotates like a spinning wheel in combat.

questions.question: What is the name of Hera Syndulla's starship, home base for the crew in Star Wars Rebels?
questions.explanation: The Ghost is the modified freighter that serves as the crew's home and base of operations throughout Star Wars Rebels.

questions.question: Which member of Clone Force 99 has enhanced senses and typically leads the squad in The Bad Batch?
questions.explanation: Hunter, marked by his heightened senses and tracking ability, serves as the field leader of Clone Force 99.

questions.question: Which young clone found on Kamino ages at a normal human rate rather than the accelerated rate of other clones?
questions.explanation: Omega is a clone of Jango Fett who, unlike her batch, lacks the genetic modifications causing accelerated aging.

questions.question: Which clone trooper, rescued after Techno Union experiments, joins Clone Force 99 with cybernetic enhancements?
questions.explanation: Echo survived capture and cybernetic experimentation before being rescued and joining the Bad Batch as a member.

questions.question: What is the name of the secretive Mandalorian covert that raises Din Djarin after his parents' deaths?
questions.explanation: Din Djarin is raised by the Children of the Watch, a hidden Mandalorian covert following strict ancient traditions.

questions.question: Who is the reformed gunslinger who becomes marshal of Freetown while wearing Boba Fett's old armor?
questions.explanation: Cobb Vanth protects the settlers of Freetown on Tatooine while wearing armor he purchased from Jawas.

questions.question: What title is given to the covert's blacksmith who forges Din Djarin's beskar armor?
questions.explanation: The Armorer crafts and reshapes beskar armor for the covert and presides over its traditions and rites.

questions.question: Who is the Magistrate of Corvus who serves Grand Admiral Thrawn in the series Ahsoka?
questions.explanation: Morgan Elsbeth rules Corvus as Magistrate while secretly working to bring Grand Admiral Thrawn back from exile.

questions.question: Who is the wealthy Coruscant antiquities dealer secretly funding and organizing the early rebellion in Andor?
questions.explanation: Luthen Rael poses as an antiquities dealer while secretly building and funding a growing network of rebel cells.

questions.question: On which prison planet's factory is Cassian Andor sentenced to forced labor in Andor?
questions.explanation: Cassian Andor is imprisoned in a brutal factory labor facility on the planet Narkina 5.

questions.question: What is the name of the ambitious Inquisitor known as the Third Sister in Obi-Wan Kenobi?
questions.explanation: Reva, the Third Sister, hunts Obi-Wan Kenobi while secretly plotting revenge against Darth Vader.

questions.question: What is the designation of the small droid that accompanies young Leia Organa in Obi-Wan Kenobi?
questions.explanation: Lola, designated L0-LA59, is the small companion droid built by Leia and present during her kidnapping.

questions.question: Which Kel Dor Jedi Master, requiring a breath mask, serves on the Jedi Council during the Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Plo Koon is a Kel Dor Jedi Master who wears a breath mask and antiglare goggles suited to his species' needs.

questions.question: Which Nautolan Jedi Master is known for his easy grin and skill in underwater combat?
questions.explanation: Kit Fisto is a Nautolan Jedi Master whose species' aquatic origins make him a formidable underwater fighter.

questions.question: Which Tholothian Jedi Council member is killed by Savage Opress during the Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Jedi Master Adi Gallia is killed by Savage Opress while pursuing him and Darth Maul on Florrum.

questions.question: Which Twi'lek Jedi General is killed by her own clone troopers on Felucia when Order 66 is issued?
questions.explanation: Jedi General Aayla Secura is shot down by Clone Commander Bly's troops on Felucia as Order 66 takes effect.

questions.question: Which Padawan of Luminara Unduli frames Ahsoka Tano for bombing the Jedi Temple in The Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Barriss Offee secretly bombs the Jedi Temple and frames her friend Ahsoka Tano, leading to Ahsoka's temporary expulsion.

questions.question: Which Jedi Master is known throughout the Order for wielding a lightsaber with a rare purple blade?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu is famous for his distinctive purple lightsaber blade, one of the rarest colors among the Jedi Order.

questions.question: Which Sith Lord secretly serves as Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic before becoming Emperor?
questions.explanation: Darth Sidious hides in plain sight as Chancellor Palpatine while orchestrating the Clone Wars and the Jedi Order's fall.

questions.question: What Sith name does Count Dooku take after leaving the Jedi Order to serve Darth Sidious?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku becomes Darth Sidious's Sith apprentice under the name Darth Tyranus during the Clone Wars.

questions.question: Which ancient Sith Lord, mentioned in Palpatine's opera house story, could reputedly cheat death itself?
questions.explanation: Palpatine tells Anakin the legend of Darth Plagueis, a Sith Lord so powerful he could influence life and death itself.

questions.question: Who is Darth Maul's Zabrak brother, transformed into a monstrous Sith assassin by Nightsister magic?
questions.explanation: Savage Opress is Darth Maul's brother, transformed by Mother Talzin's Nightsister magic into a hulking Sith assassin.

questions.question: Which Nightsister of Dathomir serves as Count Dooku's secret assassin, wielding twin curved-hilt lightsabers?
questions.explanation: Asajj Ventress, a Nightsister trained in the dark side, works as Count Dooku's covert assassin during the Clone Wars.

questions.question: On which planet is the Sith Lord Darth Maul born and raised by his Nightsister mother?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul is born on Dathomir, raised among the Nightsisters before Darth Sidious trains him as a Sith apprentice.

questions.question: What is the name of the floating interrogation droid used aboard the Death Star to question Princess Leia?
questions.explanation: An IT-O interrogation droid is brought in to torture Princess Leia for information about the stolen Death Star plans.

questions.question: What is the designation of the protocol-turned-bounty-hunter droid who works alongside Zuckuss?
questions.explanation: 4-LOM, a former protocol droid, becomes a skilled bounty hunter partnered with the insectoid Zuckuss.

questions.question: Which bounty hunter droid is among those hired by Darth Vader to track the Millennium Falcon?
questions.explanation: IG-88, a tall assassin droid, is among the bounty hunters summoned by Darth Vader to find the Millennium Falcon.

questions.question: What is the designation of the reprogrammed bounty hunter droid who joins Din Djarin's crew in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: IG-11 is reprogrammed from a killing machine into a nurturing protector who joins Din Djarin's mission.

questions.question: What is the full astromech designation of the droid known as Chopper in Star Wars Rebels?
questions.explanation: Chopper's full designation is C1-10P, an old and cantankerous astromech who serves aboard the Ghost.

questions.question: What is the name of the city-covered ecumenopolis that serves as capital of the Galactic Republic?
questions.explanation: Coruscant, entirely covered by a single sprawling city, serves as the capital of the Galactic Republic and later the Empire.

questions.question: What is the name of the lush, watery planet that is home to Padmé Amidala and the Gungans?
questions.explanation: Naboo is Padmé Amidala's homeworld, shared by the human settlers and the native Gungan species.

questions.question: On which volcanic planet do Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker fight their climactic duel?
questions.explanation: The former friends duel amid rivers of lava on the volcanic planet Mustafar in Revenge of the Sith.

questions.question: What is the name of the New Republic capital destroyed by Starkiller Base in The Force Awakens?
questions.explanation: Starkiller Base fires its weapon to obliterate Hosnian Prime, wiping out the New Republic's capital and Senate.

questions.question: What is the name of the salt-crystal planet where the Resistance makes its final stand in The Last Jedi?
questions.explanation: The remaining Resistance fighters make their desperate last stand inside an old rebel base on the mineral world Crait.

questions.question: What is the general name given to the sleek chrome vessel Padmé Amidala pilots during the Battle of Naboo?
questions.explanation: The Naboo Royal Starship carries Queen Amidala's party to Coruscant and back during the crisis in The Phantom Menace.

questions.question: What is the name of General Grievous's flagship during the Battle of Coruscant in Revenge of the Sith?
questions.explanation: General Grievous commands the Invisible Hand, the Separatist flagship where he holds Chancellor Palpatine captive.

questions.question: What is the name of Grand Admiral Thrawn's Imperial Star Destroyer flagship?
questions.explanation: The Chimaera serves as Grand Admiral Thrawn's flagship, seen throughout Star Wars Rebels and later canon appearances.

questions.question: What is the name of Supreme Leader Snoke's massive flagship, rammed at lightspeed in The Last Jedi?
questions.explanation: Vice Admiral Holdo sacrifices herself by ramming her transport at lightspeed into Snoke's flagship, the Supremacy.

questions.question: What is the name of Din Djarin's gunship, destroyed partway through The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: The Razor Crest is Din Djarin's trusted gunship until it is destroyed during a confrontation with the remnant Empire.

questions.question: What is the name of the tentacled beast that lives in the Great Pit of Carkoon and slowly digests prey?
questions.explanation: The Sarlacc dwells in the Great Pit of Carkoon, where Jabba the Hutt plans to feed it Luke and his friends.

questions.question: What large, clawed creature does Luke Skywalker fight in a pit beneath Jabba's palace?
questions.explanation: Luke is thrown into a pit to face Jabba's pet rancor, a massive clawed beast, and manages to defeat it.

questions.question: What is the name of the horned, ice-dwelling predator that attacks Luke Skywalker on Hoth?
questions.explanation: A wampa drags Luke Skywalker into its ice cave on Hoth at the start of The Empire Strikes Back.

questions.question: What snow-dwelling reptomammals do Rebel troops ride as mounts on the ice planet Hoth?
questions.explanation: Rebel scouts ride tauntauns, hardy reptomammals suited to Hoth's frozen terrain, during patrols outside Echo Base.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what beast is kept in a pit beneath Jabba's palace?
questions.explanation: The rancor is the large predator Jabba keeps beneath his throne room.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, what massive desert predator do Din Djarin and the Tusken Raiders team up to defeat?
questions.explanation: Din Djarin allies with local Tusken Raiders and settlers to bring down a massive krayt dragon threatening Tatooine.

questions.question: What is the name of the enormous reptilian creature unearthed by clone troopers on Malastare?
questions.explanation: The Zillo Beast, a massive armored reptile, is uncovered by clone troopers during fighting on the planet Malastare.

questions.question: Which Rebel general oversees the evacuation of Echo Base during the Battle of Hoth?
questions.explanation: General Carlist Rieekan commands Echo Base and directs the Rebel evacuation as Imperial forces close in on Hoth.

questions.question: Which green-skinned Rodian bounty hunter confronts Han Solo in the Mos Eisley cantina?
questions.explanation: Greedo, a Rodian working for Jabba the Hutt, corners Han Solo in the cantina demanding payment of his debt.

questions.question: Who is the Twi'lek majordomo who manages Jabba the Hutt's palace on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Bib Fortuna serves as Jabba the Hutt's loyal majordomo, greeting visitors and managing palace affairs.

questions.question: Who is the Alderaanian senator who adopts Leia and dies with his homeworld's destruction?
questions.explanation: Senator Bail Organa, Leia's adoptive father, perishes when the Death Star obliterates Alderaan.

questions.question: What is the name of the secret Imperial directive that orders clone troopers to execute their Jedi commanders?
questions.explanation: Order 66 is the hidden command programmed into every clone trooper, triggering the mass execution of the Jedi.

questions.question: What kind of animal is Pascal in Tangled?
questions.explanation: Pascal is Rapunzel's loyal pet chameleon.

questions.question: Who is Simba's father in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Mufasa is Simba's father and the king of the Pride Lands.

questions.question: What type of robot is Baymax designed to be?
questions.explanation: Baymax is a personal healthcare companion built to help people.

questions.question: What allows Dumbo to fly?
questions.explanation: Dumbo's unusually large ears let him soar through the air.

questions.question: What is the name of Mulan's small dragon companion?
questions.explanation: Mushu is the tiny dragon who helps Mulan on her journey.

questions.question: What kind of animal is Officer Judy Hopps?
questions.explanation: Judy Hopps is the first rabbit police officer in Zootopia.

questions.question: Whose heart does Moana return at the end of her voyage?
questions.explanation: Moana restores the heart of Te Fiti and heals the ocean.

questions.question: What is the name of Aladdin's monkey?
questions.explanation: Abu is Aladdin's clever and sometimes mischievous monkey friend.

questions.question: Who serves as Pinocchio's conscience?
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket is appointed to guide Pinocchio as his conscience.

questions.question: What is Mirabel's father's name in Encanto?
questions.explanation: Agustin Madrigal is the father of Mirabel, Isabela, and Luisa.

questions.question: What animal is Emperor Kuzco transformed into?
questions.explanation: Yzma's potion transforms Kuzco into a llama.

questions.question: What experiment number was given to Stitch?
questions.explanation: Stitch was created as Experiment 626 by Dr. Jumba Jookiba.

questions.question: What kind of toy is Woody?
questions.explanation: Woody is Andy's pull-string cowboy doll.

questions.question: What kind of fish is Nemo?
questions.explanation: Nemo and his father Marlin are clownfish.

questions.question: What lifts Carl's house into the sky in Up?
questions.explanation: Thousands of colorful balloons carry Carl's house away.

questions.question: What is Remy's special talent in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Remy has an exceptional sense of taste and dreams of becoming a chef.

questions.question: Which emotion is represented by a glowing yellow character in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Joy glows yellow and tries to keep Riley happy.

questions.question: What is the name of the city where Sulley and Mike work?
questions.explanation: Monsters, Inc. supplies energy to the city of Monstropolis.

questions.question: What racing number is Lightning McQueen?
questions.explanation: Lightning McQueen races with the number 95.

questions.question: Where does WALL-E place the small plant he discovers?
questions.explanation: WALL-E carefully protects the plant in an old boot.

questions.question: Which instrument does Miguel love to play?
questions.explanation: Miguel dreams of becoming a guitarist like Ernesto de la Cruz.

questions.question: Which skill is Princess Merida especially known for?
questions.explanation: Merida is an expert archer who competes for her own hand.

questions.question: Who designs the superhero family's suits in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Edna Mode creates stylish suits with practical superhero features.

questions.question: What instrument does Joe Gardner play professionally?
questions.explanation: Joe is a jazz pianist and middle-school music teacher.

questions.question: What kind of insect is Flik?
questions.explanation: Flik is an inventive ant who tries to help his colony.

questions.question: What does Cinderella leave behind at the royal ball?
questions.explanation: Cinderella loses one glass slipper while rushing home.

questions.question: What does Belle especially love to do?
questions.explanation: Belle is an eager reader who dreams of adventures beyond her village.

questions.question: What kind of creature is Ariel at the beginning of her story?
questions.explanation: Ariel is a mermaid and the youngest daughter of King Triton.

questions.question: What is the name of Jasmine's tiger?
questions.explanation: Rajah is Princess Jasmine's loyal tiger companion.

questions.question: How many dwarfs share their cottage with Snow White?
questions.explanation: Snow White stays with seven dwarfs in their forest cottage.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which name does Princess Aurora use while living in the forest?
questions.explanation: The three fairies raise Aurora under the name Briar Rose.

questions.question: What is Tiana saving money to open?
questions.explanation: Tiana works tirelessly toward opening her own restaurant.

questions.question: What magical power does Rapunzel's hair have?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel's glowing hair can heal injuries and restore youth.

questions.question: What is the name of Pocahontas's raccoon friend?
questions.explanation: Meeko is the curious raccoon who often searches for snacks.

questions.question: What is the name of Merida's horse?
questions.explanation: Angus is Merida's large black Clydesdale horse.

questions.question: What is the name of Mulan's father?
questions.explanation: Mulan takes the place of her injured father, Fa Zhou, in the army.

questions.question: What object holds the Beast's enchanted deadline?
questions.explanation: The Beast must learn to love before the enchanted rose loses its final petal.

questions.question: What is Mary Poppins hired to do?
questions.explanation: Mary Poppins arrives as the new nanny for the Banks children.

questions.question: What is the name of Captain Jack Sparrow's famous ship?
questions.explanation: Jack Sparrow repeatedly seeks command of the Black Pearl.

questions.question: What is the digital world inside the computer system called in TRON?
questions.explanation: Programs and users compete inside the digital realm known as the Grid.

questions.question: Who accidentally shrinks his children with an experimental machine?
questions.explanation: Inventor Wayne Szalinski's shrinking machine reduces the children to tiny size.

questions.question: Where is the treasure map hidden in National Treasure?
answers: On the back of the Declaration of Independence
questions.explanation: Ben Gates discovers clues on the back of the Declaration of Independence.

questions.question: What is the family name of the three witches in Hocus Pocus?
questions.explanation: Winifred, Mary, and Sarah are the Sanderson sisters.

questions.question: From which animated kingdom does Giselle arrive in New York City?
questions.explanation: Giselle is sent from the fairy-tale kingdom of Andalasia to Manhattan.

questions.question: What is the first name of the skipper played by Dwayne Johnson in Jungle Cruise?
questions.explanation: Frank Wolff captains the riverboat La Quila.

questions.question: Which career does Estella pursue in Cruella?
questions.explanation: Estella is a gifted designer determined to make her name in London fashion.

questions.question: What are the first names of the twins in The Parent Trap?
questions.explanation: Hallie Parker and Annie James discover they are twins at summer camp.

questions.question: Which two family members switch bodies in Freaky Friday?
questions.explanation: Anna and her mother Tess wake up in each other's bodies.

questions.question: What device gives the hero of The Rocketeer his powers?
questions.explanation: Pilot Cliff Secord discovers a rocket pack that lets him fly.

questions.question: What is the name of the dragon in Pete's Dragon?
questions.explanation: Elliott is Pete's gentle, often invisible dragon friend.

questions.question: In what year did Walt Disney World's Magic Kingdom open?
questions.explanation: Magic Kingdom opened on October 1, 1971.

questions.question: In what year did Disneyland first open to guests?
questions.explanation: Disneyland opened in Anaheim in July 1955.

questions.question: Which attraction is housed inside EPCOT's large geodesic sphere?
questions.explanation: Spaceship Earth explores the history of human communication.

questions.question: What giant park icon stands at the center of Disney's Animal Kingdom?
questions.explanation: The Tree of Life features hundreds of carved animals.

questions.question: At which Walt Disney World park is The Twilight Zone Tower of Terror located?
questions.explanation: The haunted Hollywood Tower Hotel rises over Sunset Boulevard at Hollywood Studios.

questions.question: Which fruit gives the classic Dole Whip its signature flavor?
questions.explanation: The best-known Dole Whip is a pineapple-flavored frozen treat.

questions.question: Which transportation system glides on a beam between Magic Kingdom and nearby resorts?
questions.explanation: The Walt Disney World Monorail serves Magic Kingdom and nearby resorts.

questions.question: How many happy haunts are said to live in the Haunted Mansion?
questions.explanation: The mansion famously claims room for one more among its 999 happy haunts.

questions.question: What type of attraction is Space Mountain?
questions.explanation: Space Mountain is an indoor roller coaster through a dark space setting.

questions.question: What kind of vehicle carries guests through Pirates of the Caribbean?
questions.explanation: Guests board boats for the voyage through pirate scenes.

questions.question: Which castle is the icon of Magic Kingdom in Florida?
questions.explanation: Cinderella Castle stands at the end of Main Street, U.S.A.

questions.question: Which Disneyland mountain attraction was inspired by the real Matterhorn?
questions.explanation: Matterhorn Bobsleds opened at Disneyland with a scale-inspired alpine mountain.

questions.question: Which Animal Kingdom attraction uses safari trucks to tour an African savanna?
questions.explanation: Kilimanjaro Safaris carries guests through the Harambe Wildlife Reserve.

questions.question: Which character performs Under the Sea?
questions.explanation: Sebastian sings about the joys of life beneath the waves.

questions.question: Which movie introduced the phrase Hakuna Matata as a song?
questions.explanation: Timon and Pumbaa teach Simba their worry-free philosophy in The Lion King.

questions.question: Which couple sings A Whole New World?
questions.explanation: Aladdin and Jasmine sing while traveling on the magic carpet.

questions.question: Which character sings Part of Your World?
questions.explanation: Ariel sings about her wish to experience life on land.

questions.question: Who sings You're Welcome to Moana?
questions.explanation: Maui boasts about his legendary deeds in You're Welcome.

questions.question: Which enchanted object leads Be Our Guest?
questions.explanation: Lumiere welcomes Belle with the castle's grand dinner production.

questions.question: Which young character sings I Just Can't Wait to Be King?
questions.explanation: Young Simba imagines the freedom he expects as future king.

questions.question: Which movie features You've Got a Friend in Me?
questions.explanation: You've Got a Friend in Me is the signature friendship song of Toy Story.

questions.question: Which family is at the center of We Don't Talk About Bruno?
questions.explanation: The Madrigal family shares conflicting stories about Bruno.

questions.question: Which character sings The Bare Necessities with Mowgli?
questions.explanation: Baloo teaches Mowgli to relax and enjoy life's bare necessities.

questions.question: Which song does Moana sing about the horizon calling her?
questions.explanation: How Far I'll Go expresses Moana's pull toward the ocean beyond the reef.

questions.question: What is Captain America's shield primarily made from?
questions.explanation: Captain America's nearly indestructible shield is made from vibranium.

questions.question: What is the name of Thor's hammer?
questions.explanation: Mjolnir is the enchanted hammer traditionally wielded by Thor.

questions.question: What is Iron Man's real name?
questions.explanation: Inventor Tony Stark builds and wears the Iron Man armor.

questions.question: Which hero protects the nation of Wakanda?
questions.explanation: The Black Panther is Wakanda's protector and ceremonial leader.

questions.question: What is the Hulk's human name?
questions.explanation: Scientist Bruce Banner transforms into the Hulk.

questions.question: What is Spider-Man's civilian name?
questions.explanation: Peter Parker balances everyday life with being Spider-Man.

questions.question: What phrase does Groot say most often?
questions.explanation: Groot communicates almost entirely with the phrase I am Groot.

questions.question: Which object does Doctor Strange wear around his neck in his first film?
questions.explanation: The Eye of Agamotto houses the Time Stone in Doctor Strange.

questions.question: What particles allow Ant-Man to change size?
questions.explanation: Hank Pym's particles power the Ant-Man suit's size changes.

questions.question: What is Black Widow's full name?
questions.explanation: Natasha Romanoff is the Avenger known as Black Widow.

questions.question: Which weapon is Hawkeye best known for using?
questions.explanation: Clint Barton is a master archer who uses specialized trick arrows.

questions.question: What is Captain Marvel's human name?
questions.explanation: Carol Danvers becomes the cosmic hero Captain Marvel.

questions.question: Which New York building serves as the Avengers' first major headquarters?
questions.explanation: Stark Tower is converted into the Avengers' Manhattan headquarters.

questions.question: Who is revealed to be Luke Skywalker's father?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader reveals that he is Luke's father, Anakin Skywalker.

questions.question: What is Princess Leia's home planet?
questions.explanation: Leia was raised as a princess of Alderaan.

questions.question: What is the name of Han Solo's ship?
questions.explanation: Han Solo and Chewbacca pilot the Millennium Falcon.

questions.question: Which droid carries the Death Star plans to Luke Skywalker?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 carries Leia's message and the stolen battle-station plans.

questions.question: What species is Chewbacca?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca is a Wookiee from the planet Kashyyyk.

questions.question: What weapon is traditionally carried by a Jedi?
questions.explanation: The lightsaber is the signature weapon of Jedi Knights.

questions.question: Who protects Grogu during much of The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: The Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin becomes Grogu's guardian.

questions.question: Which droid has a rolling ball-shaped body?
questions.explanation: BB-8 rolls on a spherical body while its head stays balanced above it.

questions.question: How many suns are visible from the surface of Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Tatooine orbits twin suns, creating its famous binary sunset.

questions.question: What name did Emperor Palpatine use as a Sith Lord?
questions.explanation: Palpatine secretly operates as the Sith Lord Darth Sidious.

questions.question: On which planet does Rey live as a scavenger?
questions.explanation: Rey survives by scavenging wrecked starships on Jakku.

questions.question: What species is Ahsoka Tano?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka is a Togruta from the planet Shili.

questions.question: What is the Empire's moon-sized battle station called?
questions.explanation: The Death Star is built around a superlaser capable of destroying planets.
